de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Class MiscTools

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.util.MiscTools

  • public final class MiscTools
extends Object
    Collection of some common, stateless functionality. Stolen from the weissInvariants side branch.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • concat

        public static <S,T extends S> S[] concat(S[] s1,
                                         T[] s2)
        Concatenates two arrays. The second array may have an entry type that is a subtype of the first one.

      • apply

        public static <S,T,U> Map<S,U> apply(Map<S,? extends T> m0,
                                     Map<T,U> m1)
        Combine two maps by function application. Values of m0 which are not keys of m1 are dropped. This implementation tries to use the same implementation of Map (provided in Java SE) as m0.

      • disectFilename

        static List<String> disectFilename(String filename)
        Separates the single directory entries in a filename. The first element is an empty String iff the filename is absolute. (For a Windows filename, it contains a drive letter and a colon). Ignores double slashes and slashes at the end, removes references to the cwd. E.g., "/home//daniel/./key/" yields {"","home","daniel","key"}. Tries to automatically detect UNIX or Windows directory delimiters. There is no check whether all other characters are valid for filenames.

      • makeFilenameRelative

        public static String makeFilenameRelative(String origFilename,
                                          String toFilename)
        Returns a filename relative to another one. The second parameter needs to be absolute and is expected to refer to directory This method only operates on Strings, not on real files! Note that it treats Strings case-sensitive. The resulting filename always uses UNIX directory delimiters. Raises a RuntimeException if no relative path could be found (may happen on Windows systems).

      • removeDotDot

        private static String[] removeDotDot(String[] a)

        public static Name toValidTacletName(String s)

        public static String toValidFileName(String s)

        public static Name toValidVariableName(String s)

      • join

        public static String join(Iterable<?> collection,
                          String delimiter)
        Join the string representations of a collection of objects into onw string. The individual elements are separated by a delimiter. Object.toString() is used to turn the objects into strings.
        Parameters:
        collection - an arbitrary non-null collection
        delimiter - a non-null string which is put between the elements.
        Returns:
        the concatenation of all string representations separated by the delimiter

      • join

        public static String join(Object[] collection,
                          String delimiter)
        Join the string representations of an array of objects into one string. The individual elements are separated by a delimiter. Object.toString() is used to turn the objects into strings.
        Parameters:
        collection - an arbitrary non-null array of objects
        delimiter - a non-null string which is put between the elements.
        Returns:
        the concatenation of all string representations separated by the delimiter

      • filterAlphabetic

        public static String filterAlphabetic(String string)
        Takes a string and returns a string which is potentially shorter and contains a sub-collection of the original characters. All alphabetic characters (A-Z and a-z) are copied to the result while all other characters are removed.
        Parameters:
        string - an arbitrary string
        Returns:
        a string which is a sub-structure of the original character sequence

      • containsWholeWord

        public static boolean containsWholeWord(String s,
                                        String word)
        Checks whether a string contains another one as a whole word (i.e., separated by whitespaces or a semicolon at the end).
        Parameters:
        s - string to search in
        word - string to be searched for

      • isJMLComment

        public static boolean isJMLComment(String comment)
        There are different kinds of JML markers. See Section 4.4 "Annotation markers" of the JML reference manual.
        Parameters:
        comment -
        Returns:

      • getRuleDisplayName

        public static String getRuleDisplayName(Node node)

        Returns the display name of the applied rule in the given Node of the proof tree in KeY.

        This method is required for the symbolic execution tree extraction, e.g. used in the Symbolic Execution Tree Debugger.

        Parameters:
        node - The given Node.
        Returns:
        The display name of the applied rule in the given Node or null if no one exists.

      • getRuleDisplayName

        public static String getRuleDisplayName(RuleApp ruleApp)

        Returns the display name of the RuleApp.

        This method is required for the symbolic execution tree extraction, e.g. used in the Symbolic Execution Tree Debugger.

        Parameters:
        ruleApp - The given RuleApp.
        Returns:
        The display name of the RuleApp or null if no one exists.

      • getRuleName

        public static String getRuleName(Node node)

        Returns the name of the applied rule in the given Node of the proof tree in KeY.

        This method is required for the symbolic execution tree extraction, e.g. used in the Symbolic Execution Tree Debugger.

        Parameters:
        node - The given Node.
        Returns:
        The display name of the applied rule in the given Node or null if no one exists.

      • getRuleName

        public static String getRuleName(RuleApp ruleApp)

        Returns the name of the RuleApp.

        This method is required for the symbolic execution tree extraction, e.g. used in the Symbolic Execution Tree Debugger.

        Parameters:
        ruleApp - The given RuleApp.
        Returns:
        The display name of the RuleApp or null if no one exists.

      • findOneStepSimplifier

        public static OneStepSimplifier findOneStepSimplifier(Proof proof)
        Returns the OneStepSimplifier used in the given Proof.
        Parameters:
        proof - The Proof to get its used OneStepSimplifier.
        Returns:
        The used OneStepSimplifier or null if not available.

        Returns the OneStepSimplifier used in the given Profile.
        Parameters:

        The used OneStepSimplifier or null if not available.

        The source file name or null if not available.
